definitions: A botanical garden and artist's studio in Marrakech, Morocco, created by the French Orientalist artist Jacques Majorelle.
A shade of blue, known as Majorelle Blue, popularized by the garden of the same name.
examples: The Majorelle Garden is a popular tourist attraction in Marrakech.
The artist was inspired by the vibrant Majorelle Blue.
Yves Saint Laurent's ashes were scattered in the Majorelle Garden.
